description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a natural light wood finish. The front features two vertically aligned doors, the upper section with transparent or semi-transparent panels, likely glass or acrylic, revealing multiple interior shelves, while the lower section has opaque panels. The cabinet stands on four slender legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The sides and back are solid wood, with no visible openings or decorative elements. The handles are small and centrally placed on each door, allowing easy access to the interior compartments.
description: A tall, light wood cabinet with glass-paneled upper doors, opaque lower doors, and multiple interior shelves.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors, upper glass panels, lower opaque panels, and interior shelving.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's depth and solid wood construction, with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid wood back with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and solid wood side.
